function:
def modify_features(df_input) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """
    Thought 1: The absolute difference between Left-Weight and Right-Weight can capture the imbalance in weight distribution.
    New Feature 1: weight_difference | weight_difference = abs(Left-Weight - Right-Weight)
    """
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    """
    Thought 1: The absolute difference between Left-Weight and Right-Weight can capture the imbalance in weight distribution.
    Thought 2: Weight and distance ratio on both sides can capture the imbalance distribution.
    Thought 3: The minimum and maximum weights on both sides can capture the most extreme scenarios.
    Thought 4: The standard deviation of weights and distances on both sides can capture the data distribution.
    
    New Feature 1: weight_difference | weight_difference = abs(Left-Weight - Right-Weight)
    New Feature 2: weight_ratio | weight_ratio = Left-Weight / Right-Weight
    New Feature 3: weight_ratio2 | weight_ratio2 = Right-Weight / Left-Weight
    New Feature 4: distance_ratio | distance_ratio = Left-Distance / Right-Distance
    New Feature 5: distance_ratio2 | distance_ratio2 = Right-Distance / Left-Distance
    New Feature 6: weight_min | weight_min = pd.to_numeric(df_input['Left-Weight'] < df_input['Right-Weight'], downcast='integer')
    New Feature 7: weight_max | weight_max = pd.to_numeric(df_input['Left-Weight'] > df_input['Right-Weight'], downcast='integer')
    New Feature 8: weight_std | weight_std = df_input['Left-Weight'].std()
    New Feature 9: distance_std | distance_std = df_input['Left-Distance'].std()

    """
    df_output = df_input.copy()
    
    # Calculate absolute difference between Left-Weight and Right-Weight
    df_output['weight_difference'] = abs(df_output['Left-Weight'] - df_output['Right-Weight'])
    
    # Calculate weight ratio
    df_output['weight_ratio'] = df_output['Left-Weight'] / df_output['Right-Weight']
    df_output['weight_ratio2'] = df_output['Right-Weight'] / df_output['Left-Weight']
    
    # Calculate distance ratio
    df_output['distance_ratio'] = df_output['Left-Distance'] / df_output['Right-Distance']
    df_output['distance_ratio2'] = df_output['Right-Distance'] / df_output['Left-Distance']
